rationale: Both papers center on online WOM review evaluation/usefulness in similar settings (the cited paper uses Yelp usefulness votes and negativity-bias/attribution mechanisms; the citing paper models Yelp/Amazon helpfulness and valence-contingent swearing effects). Given this strong construct and outcome overlap, the 2013 JMR article is plausibly a theoretical/empirical antecedent rather than an obvious incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
